_comment: Anti-revisit memory for Tier-1 discovery (LLM aid, NOT read by the deterministic pipeline). Candidates already verified as dead-ends so future discovery runs do not re-spend search budget on them. Skip any candidate whose name or url appears here. 'reason' codes: closed | fetch_403 | ssl_expired | dns_fail | off_scope | js_no_deal (page is JS-rendered with no machine-readable deal — revisit only with local Playwright, not the unattended cron) | non_consumer_deal (only an industry/employee or non-deal perk was extractable). Prune an entry if a venue reopens or gets a crawlable official page.

rejected.name: Crackin' Kitchen
rejected.note: domain does not resolve + Yelp closed

rejected.name: Mariposa
rejected.note: Neiman Marcus Ala Moana; closed end of May 2026

rejected.name: Sansei Seafood Restaurant & Sushi Bar (Waikiki)
rejected.note: Waikiki Beach Marriott location permanently closed (Maui/Big Island still open)

rejected.name: Kono's
rejected.note: official site returns 403 to logged-out crawler

rejected.name: RumFire Waikiki
rejected.note: 403; Aloha Hour exists but page not crawlable

rejected.name: Bevy
rejected.note: TLS certificate expired; fetch layer rejects (Kakaako)

rejected.name: Morimoto Asia Waikiki
rejected.note: real 5-7pm HH but JS-rendered; revisit with local Playwright

rejected.note: daily HH 4-7pm but JS-rendered; revisit with local Playwright

rejected.note: only a promo merch perk extractable, not the HH deal

rejected.name: Kona Brewing Hawai'i Kai
rejected.note: extracted deal is industry/employee-only (blue card / food handler), not a general consumer deal

rejected.name: Bar Leather Apron
